ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the ticket */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Current status of the ticket */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject or title of the ticket */,
  "due_by" TEXT /* Due date for the ticket */,
  "fr_due_by" TEXT /* First response due date for the ticket */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requester who created the ticket */,
  "group_id" REAL /* Group or department ID associated with the ticket */,
  "source" INTEGER /* Source of the ticket (e.g., email, phone, chat) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket was last updated */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tags associated with the ticket */,
  "parent_ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent ticket (if any) */,
  "is_parent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the ticket is a parent ticket */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., technical, billing, etc.) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES requesters ("requester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requesters" (
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requester */,
  "requester_name" TEXT /* Full name of the requester */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the requester */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the requester */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the requester belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" REAL /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the group belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket being updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., status change, comment added, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_updates_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, supervisor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned */,
  "group_id" REAL /* ID of the group being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket Attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attached file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attached file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attached file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the metric belongs to */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the ticket */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the ticket */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Customer satisfaction rating for the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
